positive: An abstract, stylized geometric illustration of a celestial map merging with a vibrant tropical jungle. Central composition featuring stylized constellations (like the Big Dipper and Orion) integrated seamlessly into lush, hyper-detailed flora patterns (monstera leaves, banana palms, orchids). The style should be inspired by Art Nouveau botanical etchings and Mid-Century modern screen printing, using a limited but rich palette of deep teal, burnt orange, mustard yellow, and cream white. Strong, clean silhouettes and intricate line work are paramount. The overall effect must be highly scalable and aesthetically pleasing as a seamless repeat pattern for apparel. Flat vector aesthetic with gradient shading for depth. Perfect central balance.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, noisy, watermark, text, logo, signature, poor quality, bad composition, grayscale, realistic photo, extra limbs, bad anatomy
